summary: Iteration 49 - World State Globe transformation testing complete. All new World State features verified: rich header with 'מצב השדה' title and 'חי' live indicator, 3 metric cards (dominant direction with color-coded dot, live action counter with animation, momentum status), regional hotspots showing top 4 regions with counts, direction distribution bar with color segments, globe canvas with dark earth rendering, field heartbeat glow animation, direction legend with 4 direction counts. GlobalFieldDashboard is now a compact single-line status bar. All regression tests pass (6 tabs, OrientationMap visible on all tabs, profile page, Quick Action FAB, feedback button, entry layer with world direction).
critical_code_review_comments: Auto-refresh intervals correctly set: globe every 40s, field every 25s
Three types of pulses implemented: ambient (6-9s at hotspot coords), spike (20-30s larger maxR 12), hotspot glow (15s at active regions)
Live action counter animates smoothly with step-based animation
Globe uses transparent background (rgba(0,0,0,0)) allowing dark section to show through
Ring colors use direction-coded colors with alpha transparency
GlobalFieldDashboard refactored to compact single-line inline flex layout

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all new features work, all regressions pass)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 transforms FieldGlobeSection into World State instrument. Key data-testids: 'world-state-header', 'world-state-direction', 'world-state-actions', 'world-state-momentum', 'world-state-regions', 'globe-canvas', 'field-heartbeat', 'globe-refresh-btn', 'globe-legend-{direction}'. Globe fetches /api/orientation/globe-activity (points, color_map, today_stats) and /api/orientation/field-dashboard (dominant_direction, total_actions_today, direction_counts, top_regions, momentum_he). Compact GlobalFieldDashboard shows 'שדה: {count} פעולות · {direction} · {regions} אזורים'.

world_state_header_tests.live_indicator: PASS - 'חי' text with pulsing green dot

world_state_metrics_tests.direction_card: PASS - data-testid='world-state-direction' shows 'תרומה' with green indicator

world_state_regions_tests.top_4_regions: PASS - גרמניה 41, ישראל 40, דרום קוריאה 38, ברזיל 38

globe_tests.direction_legend: PASS - 4 legend items (תרומה, התאוששות, סדר, חקירה)

regression_tests.orientation_map_on_all_tabs: PASS - visible on Home, Feed, Community, Insights, Theory, History

api_tests.field_dashboard: PASS - returns dominant_direction, total_actions_today, direction_counts, top_regions, momentum_he
api_tests.globe_region_IL: PASS - returns country details with direction breakdown
api_tests.direction_colors_consistency: PASS - all colors match expected values
